details.test: Task 1: Create personal quote for compact EV <= 450/month
Task 2: Create fleet quote for 5 white vehicles <= 600/month
Task 3: Select cheaper compact vehicle under 750/month into fleet plan
Task 4: Schedule maintenance for three vehicles within next 7 days
Task 5: Adjust mileage plan when additional cost <= 40
Task 6: Seasonal suspension for lowest-cost lease above 400/month
Task 7: Pay highest-value unpaid invoice with Business VISA
Task 8: Create driver and assign two vehicles under 500/month
Task 9: Order 4 GPS trackers (< $20 subscription, rating >= 4) and proceed to checkout
